untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of catalysts (new products, turnaround plans, competitive advantages), mutual fund sponsorship levels, and sector classification—none of which are available in the allowed indicators list. These are fundamental/qualitative factors requiring external data sources (news sentiment, fund holdings, sector classification databases), not technicals. The volume and momentum proxies provided are best-effort approximations only.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using volume increase (vol_ratio_20 and prev_volume comparison) as proxy for positive volume momentum accompanying catalyst. Used price > sma_20 as proxy for positive momentum. However, the core signal logic—identifying novel competitive advantages, assessing fund sponsorship ranges (1-20%), confirming catalyst credibility, and excluding secular decline sectors—cannot be operationalized with technical indicators alone. This signal requires fundamental analysis, sentiment analysis, and external data integration.
